items.title: Girard Township passes strict new zoning rules for data centers
items.dek: Girard Township approved zoning changes that tighten where data centers can locate. The rules add buffers and review steps after public concerns over industrial-scale projects. Nearby Coldwater is now drafting its own regulations.
items.judge_note: Concrete new development: Girard Township actually passed (not just drafted) zoning rules, which is a completed legislative action distinct from the already-liv
